tier_b_items.reason: Report primarily lists products without identifying patterns or trends.
No causal explanations; only describes what products exist.
No explicit cross-referencing between different source types shown.
No synthesis-driven insight; just aggregated product data.
No acknowledgment of limitations or counterarguments present.
No final section with recommendations; report is incomplete.

details.raw_judge_output:
1. FAIL - Report primarily lists products without identifying patterns or trends.
2. FAIL - No causal explanations; only describes what products exist.
3. FAIL - No explicit cross-referencing between different source types shown.
4. FAIL - No synthesis-driven insight; just aggregated product data.
5. FAIL - No acknowledgment of limitations or counterarguments present.
6. FAIL - No final section with recommendations; report is incomplete.

tier_b_items.reason: Sections follow intro, background, analysis, conclusion structure.
No bridging sentences between major sections.
Contains meta-commentary like "Our systematic enumeration across nine keyword facets yielded..."
Formatting and citation style appear consistent.
Language is professional, no AI filler phrases detected.

details.raw_judge_output:
1. PASS - Sections follow intro, background, analysis, conclusion structure.
2. FAIL - No bridging sentences between major sections.

4. PASS - Formatting and citation style appear consistent.
5. FAIL - Report truncated before conclusion section.
6. PASS - Language is professional, no AI filler phrases detected.
